issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in the examples.

scenarios.name: sliding-window-rate-limiter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses a sorted set with a pipeline of `zremrangebyscore`, `zadd`, `zcard`, and `expire` keyed on the API key for a true sliding window; baseline uses a fixed-window `INCR`+`EXPIRE` counter which is a different (and burstier) algorithm than the one the skill documents.

scenarios.name: distributed-invoice-lock
scenarios.rationale: Treatment acquires with `SET key token NX EX timeout` using a `secrets.token_urlsafe` token and releases via a Lua script that atomically checks ownership before `DEL`; baseline uses plain `SETNX`/`DEL` without an owner token, so any worker can release another's lock — the exact failure mode the skill prevents.
